title: Groups
subtitle: Manage your raid groups and discover new communities

search.placeholder: Search your groups and visible communities
search.title: Search Results
search.subtitle: {count} matching groups

section_subtitles.member: Groups you're part of and can participate in
section_subtitles.discover: Visible groups ordered by their latest activity

create_modal.title: Create Group
create_modal.subtitle: Set up your group's identity, presence, discovery details, and activity window before you start organizing runs.
create_modal.slug_warning: Your slug is permanent once the group is created.

validation.slug_letters_only: Slug can only contain lowercase letters.
validation.slug_reserved: That slug is reserved. Choose a different one.
validation.image_invalid_format: Images must be JPG, JPEG, PNG, or WEBP files.
validation.image_too_large: Images must be 5 MB or smaller.
validation.tag_too_long: Each tag must be {max} characters or fewer.

identity.title: Group Identity
identity.subtitle: Choose the name, slug, and data center your group will be known by.

presence.title: Community Presence
presence.subtitle: Add optional links and imagery that make the group feel established.

discovery.title: Discovery & Group Fit
discovery.subtitle: Show what your group is like, who it is for, and how people should expect to interact with it.

schedule.title: Activity Window
schedule.subtitle: Help people understand your usual timezone, active days, and the hours your group most often plays.

visibility.title: Visibility & Access
visibility.subtitle: Control whether people can discover the group and whether they can join it freely.

description.placeholder: Tell people what your group focuses on and who it is for.

profile_picture.help: Optional. Upload an image to represent your group.
profile_picture.preview_help: This preview shows the centered square crop that will be resized and used as your group's profile image.

banner_image.label: Banner Image
banner_image.help: Optional. Upload a wide banner for the top of the group profile and discovery surfaces.
banner_image.preview_help: This preview shows the wide banner crop used for the group header and discovery cards.

discord_invite_url.help: Optional. Add a Discord invite so members can easily join your server.

recruiting_status.label: Recruiting Status
recruiting_status.help: Let people know whether the group is actively looking for new members.

primary_focuses.label: Primary Focus
primary_focuses.help: Pick the main activities or vibes people should associate with your group.

experience_expectation.label: Experience Expectation
experience_expectation.help: Set expectations for how much prior knowledge or experience people should bring.

voice_expectation.label: Voice / Discord Expectation
voice_expectation.help: Tell people whether voice chat is required, encouraged, or optional.

preferred_languages.label: Preferred Languages
preferred_languages.help: Show which languages your group mainly communicates in.

tags.label: Extra Tags
tags.placeholder: Add or create extra tags like Late Night or Blind Prog
tags.help: Optional. Use up to {max} freeform tags for extra flavor or niche details.

region.label: Operating Region
region.inferred: Based on {datacenter}, this group will be shown as operating in {region}.
region.pending: Choose a data center first to infer this group's main operating region.

active_timezone.label: Active Timezone
active_timezone.help: Optional. If you set days or hours below, choose the timezone they should be interpreted in.

active_days.label: Active Days
active_days.placeholder: Select one or more active days
active_days.help: Optional. Pick the days when your group most often runs or recruits.

active_start_time.label: Active Start Time
active_start_time.help: Optional. Typical start of your group's active window.

active_end_time.label: Active End Time
active_end_time.help: Optional. Typical end of your group's active window.

is_public.label: Public Group
is_public.help: Anyone can join public groups, and public-facing future runs can be seen by outsiders.

is_visible.label: Visible in Discovery
is_visible.help: Visible groups can appear in discovery and search, even if they are private.

visibility_summary.label: What this means
visibility_summary.public_visible: {name} can be joined by anyone and will show up in search and profiles.
visibility_summary.public_hidden: {name} can be joined by anyone, but it will not show up in discovery or searchable profiles.
visibility_summary.private_visible: {name} can only be joined via invite, but it will still show up in search and profiles.
visibility_summary.private_hidden: {name} can only be joined via invite and will stay hidden from discovery and searchable profiles.
